// intro: TypeScript config. The codebase is gradually migrating .js -> .ts; .js/.jsx and .ts/.tsx coexist (allowJs). Run `npm run typecheck` to type-check without emitting. The Next.js plugin + `next build` provide the app-router types; ambient asset-module types live in src/global.d.ts.
// strict-comment: `strict: true` is on for new code but `allowJs + checkJs: false` means existing .js files are imported as `any` — no per-file type-check noise as we migrate. To get JS files type-checked too once the codebase has a base of .ts files, flip checkJs.
